name: Aima Wars: Steampunk & Orcs
short_description: Aima Wars: Steampunk & Orcs is a world of airships, steam and technologies. The world of fierce aerial battles for scarce resources beneath the skies.
detailed_description:
Aima Wars: Steampunk & Orcs is the new standard in open-world and sandbox games. A world created by the civilization of the Ancients is filled with massive aerial battles between players, factions’ fleets and fire-breathing dragons.
Join the world of balloonists, explorers and adventurers. Create a character of one of the factions. Become a great commander of the Empire of humans or a mighty chief of the Union of orcs.
Unique airships and ships are at your disposal. They can extract resources and transport combat planes equipped with torpedoes, missiles and machine guns.
Capture the Bastions to tighten the grip of your guild on an area and use extracted and generated resources at your discretion.
Participate in a War event to earn some coins and get scarce resources or rare equipment.
Destroy enemy caravans. The holds of caravan ships are full of valuables.
Plan bold sorties into enemy territories using teleportation gates.
Level up your character and get rewards by unlocking achievements.
Build and upgrade own settlements or use production capacities of factional cities.
Become the best of the best, take the first lines in the rating and the whole world will know about your heroic deeds!
